items.title: Here is the full summer league roster. Labaron Philon and Johni Broome are on it, and new two-way signees Caleb Love and Rayan Rupert are not.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Here is the full summer league roster. Labaron Philon and Johni Broome are on it, and new two-way signees Caleb Love and Rayan Rupert are not. 

First game in Vegas is Thursday.

items.title: Caleb Love’s two-way contract with the Sixers is official. He will wear No. 9.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Caleb Love’s two-way contract with the Sixers is official. He will wear No. 9.

items.title: Caleb Love's two-way contract with the Sixers is a one-year deal, source tells @phillyvoice.com.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Caleb Love's two-way contract with the Sixers is a one-year deal, source tells @phillyvoice.com.

items.title: Having a definitively playable guard on a two-way behind Maxey/Edgecombe/Simons/Philon Jr. is very helpful for the Sixers, even if Caleb Love adds to their group of smaller guards. Frees up the Sixers to target best player available with whichever standard roster spots are open.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Having a definitively playable guard on a two-way behind Maxey/Edgecombe/Simons/Philon Jr. is very helpful for the Sixers, even if Caleb Love adds to their group of smaller guards. Frees up the Sixers to target best player available with whichever standard roster spots are open.

media.title: Report: Sixers signing Caleb Love to two-way contract
media.description: Caleb Love averaged 10.4 points, 2.5 assists and 2.3 rebounds per game with the Portland Trail Blazers last season.

items.title: [Charania] Free agent guard Caleb Love has agreed to a two-way NBA deal with the Philadelphia 76ers, sources tell ESPN.
